name: Mandailing Batak
notes: Mandailing Batak (Saro Mandailing), a Northwest Sumatran (Batak) language of Indonesia. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. The script recorded for this language is the Batak script (Surat Batak), a Brahmic ABUGIDA with an inherent /a/ and diacritic vowel signs; no abugida map is claimed here. In practice Mandailing is today most often written in the Latin script with Indonesian conventions — a Latin orthography or a romanisation would be required as input before this spec can produce anything.

ancestors.notes: Austronesian — the classification node this language sits under.

location.notes: Glottolog's representative point for Batak Mandailing.
